parsed.explanation: 1) Removed the extra closing </TITLE> tag that prematurely split the title content; the entire bibliographic title is now enclosed by a single matching <TITLE>...</TITLE> pair. 2) Corrected the tag name <PRIZE> to <PRICE> to use a semantically appropriate element for cost information.
